title: lethedon ciliaris
intro: Lethedon ciliaris, also known as the golden ragwort, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antitussive effects. The health benefits of Lethedon ciliaris include relief from coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and soothe sore throats. Lethedon ciliaris is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health conditions.
